name: Rudy, Rick
resolved_employer: BASCO, Inc. — President & CEO (industrial packaging / drum & container supply distributor)
evidence: Richard 'Rick' Rudy is President/CEO of BASCO, Inc., the family industrial-packaging firm founded 1946 by Henry Rudy; he became CEO in 1989. Identity corroborated by a 2016 FEC record listing 'RICHARD RUDY, zip 78733, BASCO, INC./CEO' — exact match on name, Austin 78733 zip, employer and title. Company is HQ'd in University Park, IL; Rudy resides in Austin. Industry label reflects wholesale/industrial distribution (medium certainty on taxonomy fit); no evidence tying him to oil/gas despite BASCO's drum-industry customer base.
